name: Okra Rice Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the okra, rice, tomato, onion, salt, pepper, baking powder, and sugar.
2. Mix the cornmeal with the flour separately.
3. Pour the beaten eggs over the okra mixture and combine.
4. Add the meal and flour mixture to the okra mixture and stir together.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil.
6. Cook the fritters until they are well browned, turning as needed.
7. Makes 30 fritters.
